case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. VADIM B. GALUSTYAN et al

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GALUSTYAN, VADIM B.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALUSTYAN, VADIM B. $9,803.24 PRINCIPAL, $2,618.36 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,701.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALUSTYAN, VADIM B.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GALUSTYAN, VADIM B.
